Home Competitions Clubs Calendar Announcements About Us Contacts

Competitions

Academic, arts, and activity competitions at middle school and high school.

Academic, arts, and activity competitions open to Frazer students. Details may vary by campus.

Middle School

Middle School

Science Olympiad

Registration closes April 15

Teams compete in hands-on science events. Practices meet Tuesdays after school in Room 204.

Middle School

Math Counts

Chapter meet: March 8

School-wide tryouts in February. Top students advance to the regional chapter competition.

Middle School

Spelling Bee

School bee: January 24

Open to grades 6–8. Classroom winners advance to the school-wide bee.

High School

High School

Science Olympiad

State tournament: April 26

High school division teams prepare for invitational and state-level events.

High School

Speech & Debate

Season runs Sep–Mar

Weekly practices and weekend tournaments. New members welcome at the start of each semester.

High School

Robotics (FIRST)

Build season: Jan–Apr

Students design and program robots for regional competition. Mentors needed — contact the PTA.

© 2025 Frazer School PTA. All rights reserved.

Serving Frazer Middle School and Frazer High School. Maintained by parent volunteers.
